representative_quotes.text: worst experience with the blinkit.... i ordered 120 Watt data cable they sent the item not even mentioned watt on box.... it's charging like 20-30 watt cable. On my request for change on the product on same day they said it's not possible use it weather its working or not..... if there will be any option to attach the customer support chat i will definitely attach. Don't order electronics from blinkit ..
I got the fake and duplicate items I will never use this app again
uninstalled, this is third time they send you expiried products with no expiry date mention ( erased by them before delivery & then they refuse to replace the same )

Don't buy anything from Blinkit, I bought some fruits and they delivered rotten ones. They asked to send email with concern, but they are telling it can be validated. This is totally unfair. Don't order anything. Boycott this fraud app.
very poor and pathetic .. u gave fault and used product and didn't replaced.. never by any electronic from blink it.. never ever. aur customer support wale to land hai ek number ke

I ordered bread, but it arrived damaged and was not fit to eat. I raised a complaint expecting a replacement, as this was needed for my family's breakfast. Instead, I was offered only a refund. A refund does not solve the immediate problem when the product is required urgently. I use Blinkit because it is convenient and I trust the service, but this experience was disappointing. I hope Blinkit improves its customer support by providing replacements for damaged essential items.

Every time I order bread, I regret it. They always crush the bread by packaging it under the items. Otherwise they are fine. Adding to this review after many months : bread delivery is still the worst.

The service was brilliant but nowadays the delivery service is becoming so poor. It is become usual that, whenever i order milk or Dahi the rider delivers it in bad condition teared carry bag and dirty milk packets, and they always say the same thing carry bag fat gaya tha.
Helpful for Icecream and coke , Chips
it's very helpful and fastest app i ever seen, vegetables, fruits electric and everything is need i just order in Blinkit app
taking extra charges on baby food items it's ridiculous
price is higher than mall price
so much excess price compared to companies' outlets

price bahut jada hai sasti cheez bhi mehengi mil rahi hai aap iska kuch kijiye mujhe bhut bura laga bo to maggie khane ka jada hi man hora tha isliye Dene pade lekin aaj k baad nahi mangaugi bht mehenga hai bye
vegetables and fruits price very high range

I thought this would be better than zepto but this is worse than zepto.. TIME TO UNINSTALL THIS APP ALWAYS TAKES TO LONG THEN COMMITMENT NO DISCOUNT NO COUPONS NOTHING ON TOP OF IT THEY FORCE YOU TO BUY MORE THAN 150RS ALWAYS... 👎
products are less available. prices are higher than zepto and other similar apps. services are poor.

The customer service is very poor. I ordered an wired earphone and it showed that it will magnetically snap. The issue was there and the functions were not as specific to the details mentioned still customer care denied change and asked to contact brand. i recommend to use zepto and other quick commerce and not blinkit.

Worst app. Worst services. If any product is faulty then they won't resolve your complain infact they would ask you to contact the brand without taking any accountability. please use instamart or other websites. this app is the worst
I ordered a data cable and it showed 7 days return and when I reached out to return they didn't accept my return worst app choose zepto or something don't order from blinkit
sab out of stock hota hai to Rakha kyu hai
many wanted products are out of stock
worst app bcs they don't keep my favorite snack....my bf🤧

Every time I urgently need something, it's always marked "Out of Stock." What's even more frustrating is that these items often stay unavailable for a long time instead of being restocked quickly. If essential products aren't available when customers need them the most, it defeats the whole purpose of a quick delivery service. Blinkit really needs to improve its inventory management because this has become a repeated and disappointing experience.
poor stock condition. items are out of stock.

So far so good. (revised after experiencing for a few more orders). To my surprise, Blinkit delivering to my Home town as well, loved the way the store and the delivery partners handling this model, makes life easier, also they maintain a wide variety of products. Only problem is that customer reviews of the product is not available, it only shows ratings.
Difficult to search

one thing that can be improved is the search feature. there are many things/ ingredients which have local names so it becomes hard to search them especially for elders and parents. other than that I don't see any short comings.
great things I can't find in market easily are available in one finger tap 😉

gr8 Experience.even foreign countries don't have this facility. i searched for printing shop unfortunately I don't find one .I just casually browse blinkit i was stunned .I have a options to print what a timing well done gr8 work
Jo dikhta hai vo nahi milta hai. kuchh aur supplied hota hai. better go to market and buy at your own choices

Blinkit's 10-minute delivery promise is the biggest lie in tech—it takes five minutes just to find a substitute for the milk they ran out of, and the other five to convince you that buying an iPhone on a grocery app makes total sense

Always store is unavailable, sometimes due to rain, due to high demand, sometimes can't deliver to your location. in my area there is no other substitute to blinkit so there no way to shift on other app. but one thing is, I was dependent on the app when it was working fine. but because of these issues I started back to my routine again after office take groceries by your own don't depend on these apps.

Only buy Electronic ls at your own risk. Other platforms have easy return policy. On Blinkit if you don't like the product there is no way you can return it. You will be stuck with the product you don't like. Just use this for groceries, it is good only for that.

yep i know most don't agree with me but this app will only help with grocery and snacks stuff that`s all it limited to that much but when it comes to speakers or earphones (electronic devices) even if it is faulty theres no guarantee at all that they will accept that product and my best peice of advice about this app is that don't always believe what you see because when I ask them the about the 7 dayz replacement policy they rejected that they can't accept at all just for eating it is good
it is worst experience, I make a first order of vegetables from blinking and half of the vegetables are in bad conditions
for very first time i order somethingfrom blinkit but packing wasso dirty plus peanut butter bottle cap was not seal ist open i want a fresh one

The pressed bone I ordered for my dog — within a few seconds, some strange thing came out of it. After taking that thing in my hand, it looked completely hollow from inside and had no weight. The product is not right. I have ordered this before as well, but I never had an experience like this. After this I chatted with Blinkit to get my problem resolved, but they closed the chat right after knowing my problem. What should I do now? If anything happens to my dog's health because of this product,

Though the delivery was very prompt, but when I opened my items as per order,I found one item "aftershave lotion"was only quarter filled ie 10ml only against 50ml. This was my first order and I feel cheated.
ordered first time in blinkit but sadly disappointed because product received was not packed at all
it's good for people who can't go out with a baby or while being sick

after comparing prices from another app I was stopped using blinkit from long time but today I was in need for my baby formula powder *****store was closed at that time so I switch back to blinkit suddenly with a disappointment but after I got delivery option at late night I was really very surprised because I got at right time . Thank you Blinkit and also I have 1 req pls make prices less.

One rainy morning, I had to go to school, but suddenly it started raining cats and dogs. My mother ordered a raincoat from Blinkit, and to our surprise, it was delivered within 30 to 35 minute . Thanks to Blinkit's superfast delivery, I reached school without getting drenched. I am really impressed with their quick and reliable service. Highly recommended!

Worst customer support experience with Blinkit. I received a defective birthday gift for my 4-year-old nephew, uploaded the proof video they asked for, and was promised a pickup before refund. No pickup, no call, no update. Even the contact number on Blinkit’s official website doesn’t work. Taking customers’ money is easy, but providing support seems impossible. I strongly suggest people not use or download this app unless they are ready to face zero customer support when problems happen.

Hostel life made so much easier for my kid! "Staying away from home in a hostel isn't easy, but this app makes it better for my child. Whenever they run out of snacks, need midnight study fuel, or forget basic essentials, I can easily order for them from miles away. The delivery riders always find the hostel easily, and the items arrive fresh and quick. I absolutely love that I can take care of their cravings and needs directly through the app, giving me total peace of mind!"
